line: Added JSONL tail integration coverage in `tests/integration/jsonl_tail.rs:1` and registered it in `Cargo.toml:21`.

line: - Root integration tests needed an explicit `[[test]]` target because the requested file lives under `tests/integration/jsonl_tail.rs` instead of Cargo’s default `tests/*.rs`.

line: - `ToolResult.stderr` is `None` when the JSON omits the field, so fixtures should omit empty stderr rather than serialize `\"stderr\":\"\"`.

line: - Kept tests external to the crate as requested instead of extending `crates/saw-daemon/src/jsonl_tail.rs:292`.

line: - Used temp directories and real file appends with a live `JsonlTailer` task to exercise actual file reads and notify/poll behavior.

line: - Verified large-file behavior by asserting all 1200 emitted events are received, which checks streaming correctness without introducing memory instrumentation.

items: Verified large-file behavior by asserting all 1200 emitted events are received, which checks streaming correctness without introducing memory instrumentation.

line: - The acceptance criteria requested `1000+` records; the test uses 1200.

items: The acceptance criteria requested `1000+` records; the test uses 1200.

line: - These tests validate observable behavior, not internal memory allocations, so “without memory issues” is covered indirectly via successful large-batch processing.
